overview: CANISTERS is a retro terminal-style ICP canister management dashboard. Track cycle balances, manage controllers, and top up canisters from your ICP account — all wrapped in a full CRT phosphor-green aesthetic.
features: Retro CRT terminal theme with phosphor green, scanlines, and glow effects
Track and monitor ICP canisters with live cycle balance display
Top up canister cycles by converting ICP from your in-app account
Manage canister controllers — add, remove, and view the app controller PID
View transaction history for all top-ups and ICP transfers
Internet Identity authentication with Principal ID and ICP Account ID display
